blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
